title.ko: 서브클래스 C05B, C 에 분류되지 않는 유기질 비료, 예. 폐기물 또는 쓰레기로부터 되는 비료
title.en: ORGANIC FERTILISERS NOT COVERED BY SUBCLASSES C05B, C05C, e.g. FERTILISERS FROM WASTE OR REFUSE

definition.ko: 퇴비화 단계가 특징인 방법 또는 그를 위한 장치는 C05F 17/00으로 분류된다.

title.en: Fertilisers made from animal corpses, or parts thereof
Apparatus for their manufacture
Fertilisers from human or animal excrements, e.g. manure
Guano
from human faecal masses
Apparatus for their manufacture
Fertilisers from distillery wastes, molasses, vinasses, sugar plant, or similar wastes or residues
Fertilisers from waste water, sewage sludge, sea slime, ooze or similar masses
from sulfite liquor or other waste lyes from the manufacture of cellulose
from waste liquors in the potash industry
Fertilisers from household or town refuse
Apparatus for the manufacture
Biological compost
Other organic fertilisers

title.ko: 이탄, 갈탄 및 유사한 식물질 매장물에서 만들어진 것
title.en: from peat, brown coal, or similar vegetable deposits

title.ko: 이탄(peat)에서 만들어진 원예용토 (이탄(peat)을 포함하는 재배 기질 A01G 24/28)
title.en: Horticultural earth from peat  (growth substrates containing peat A01G0024280000)
Apparatus for their manufacture
Organic fertilisers containing added bacterial cultures, mycelia or the like
Fertilisers containing plant vitamins or hormones

title.ko: 메인 그룹 1/00부터 11/00 중 2이상의 메인 그룹에 포함되는 비료의 혼합물； 출발 재료의 혼합물로부터 되는 비료로서, 그 모든 출발 재료가 이 서브클래스에 포함되지만, 같은 메인 그룹에 포함되지 않는 것
title.en: Mixtures of fertilisers covered by more than one of main groups C05F0001000000-C05F0011000000; Fertilisers from mixtures of starting materials, all the starting materials being covered by this subclass but not by the same main group

title.ko: 생물학적 또는 생화학적 처리 단계를 특징으로 하는 비료의 제조, 예. 퇴비화 또는 발효
title.en: Preparation of fertilisers characterised by biological or biochemical treatment steps, e.g. composting or fermentation
Treatments involving invertebrates, e.g. worms, flies or maggots

title.ko: 처리 중 물질에 물 또는 공기 이외의 물질의 첨가 또는 제거 (처리 활성화 또는 자극용 C05F17/20)
title.en: Addition or removal of substances other than water or air to or from the material during the treatment (for activating or stimulating the treatment C05F0017200000)

title.ko: 처리 활성화 또는 자극을 위해 특정 미생물 또는 물질(예. 효소)을 사용하는 것 (무척추 동물의 사용 C05F17/05)
title.en: using specific microorganisms or substances, e.g. enzymes, for activating or stimulating the treatment  (use of invertebrates C05F0017050000)
using irradiation, e.g. solar or nuclear radiation; using electric or magnetic fields
Treatment of liquids or slurries
Treatments combining two or more different biological or biochemical treatments, e.g. anaerobic and aerobic treatment or vermicomposting and aerobic treatment
Heating or cooling during the treatment
Controlling the treatment in response to process parameters
Separation, elimination or disposal of harmful substances during the treatment
Apparatus therefor
Small-scale devices without mechanical means for feeding or discharging material, e.g. garden compost bins
Portable or transportable devices, e.g. transport containers or trucks
Devices in which the material is conveyed essentially horizontally between inlet and discharge means
Cylinders or drums
Tunnels
Means for combined mixing and conveying
Devices in which the material is conveyed essentially vertically between inlet and discharge means
using two or more serially arranged devices
Constructional parts, e.g. floors, covers or doors
for feeding or discharging material to be treated; for feeding or discharging other material
the other material being gaseous
the other material being liquid
Arrangements for measuring process parameters, e.g. temperature, pressure or humidity
